productName: Doozies PLUS - Midnight Grape 1:1:1 10 Pk (80g) (100mg THC;100mg CBD;100mg CBN)
description: An artisan sweet, candy-like grape edible made to feel special — rich flavor, soft sweetness, and a cannabis finish that stays smooth and approachable. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 1:1:1 ratio. Perfect for winding down at the end of the day.
